_authoring_notes: Eligibility RULES (global exclusions, class gates, max-per-unit, unique-per-army) live in kow.json's artefact_rules block, NOT here. This file is the catalogue only: each entry carries its class and any per-artefact restriction that narrows the class/global rules further.

effects[] is present ONLY when an artefact makes an unconditional change to the profile (a named special rule that is always active, a base-stat delta, a granted spell, or a granted weapon). Conditional (e.g. 'vs Regeneration'), once-per-game, in-play to-hit modifiers, and bespoke mechanics are represented by description alone — never as a structured effect — so the resolved effective profile never shows a modifier that is not always active.
Effect vocabulary used: add_special_rule, modify_field (delta, with optional min/max), grant_spell, add_weapon (with optional weapon-level special_rules). set_field (absolute) is unused by artefacts.

class 'heroic' gates to Heroes (type begins 'Hero'); some heroic items narrow further via restrictions.allowed_types. 'Infantry and Cavalry only' => Hero (Inf), Hero (Cav) — Large Infantry/Cavalry, Chariot and Monster hero subtypes are distinct types and are excluded. 'Infantry only' => Hero (Inf).
restrictions.forbid_special_rules bars units carrying any listed rule (e.g. Individual, Fly).

artefacts.name: Blade of Slashing
artefacts.description: When rolling to hit in Combat, re-roll one of the dice that failed to hit.

artefacts.name: Fire-Oil
artefacts.description: Gains Crushing Strength (+1) and Piercing (+1), each only against units with Regeneration.

artefacts.name: Healing Brew
artefacts.description: Once per game, when given a Movement order, roll a die: on 1-3 regain 1 point of damage, on 4-6 regain 2.

artefacts.name: Liliana's Tear
artefacts.description: The unit is not affected by the Dread, Shattering, or Brutal special rules.

artefacts.name: Mace of Crushing
artefacts.description: When rolling to damage in Combat, re-roll one of the dice that failed to damage.

artefacts.name: War-Bow of Kaba
artefacts.description: Gains a ranged attack: War-Bow of Kaba 24", Att 1, Ra 4+, Piercing (1). Does not benefit from the unit's own special rules.

artefacts.name: Dwarfen Ale
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Headstrong special rule.

artefacts.name: Hann's Sanguinary Scripture
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Lifeleech (+1) special rule.

artefacts.name: Aegis of the Elohi
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Iron Resolve (+1) special rule.

artefacts.name: Chalice of Wrath
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Retaliate! special rule.

artefacts.name: Helm of Confidence
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Inspiring (Self) special rule.

artefacts.name: Mead of Madness
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Wild Charge (+1) special rule.

artefacts.name: Orb of Towering Presence
artefacts.description: Increase the unit's Unit Strength by +1.

artefacts.name: Pipes of Terror
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Brutal (+1) special rule.

artefacts.name: Sir Jesse's Boots of Striding
artefacts.description: Once per game, the unit gains both Pathfinder and Strider until the end of the Turn.

artefacts.name: Staying Stone
artefacts.description: The unit gains +1 to its Nerve stat value.

artefacts.name: Brew of Haste
artefacts.description: The unit increases its Speed stat by +1.

artefacts.name: Hammer of Measured Force
artefacts.description: In Combat, this unit always damages the enemy on a 4+ regardless of any other modifiers.

artefacts.name: Sacred Horn
artefacts.description: The range of the unit's Aura is increased to 9".

artefacts.name: Blessing of the Gods
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Elite special rule.

artefacts.name: Chant of Hate
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Vicious special rule.

artefacts.name: The Scrying Gem
artefacts.description: When starting to deploy their units, your opponent must deploy D3+1 units instead of a single one.

artefacts.name: Diadem of Dragonkind
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Fireball (4) spell; if it already has Fireball, its value is increased by 2 instead.

artefacts.name: Crystal Pendant of Retribution
artefacts.description: When the unit suffers a Rout result, all units in base contact suffer 2D6 hits with Piercing (3), resolved by the routing player against their own unit(s); no Nerve test is taken for that damage.

artefacts.name: Brew of Strength
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Crushing Strength (+1) special rule.

artefacts.name: Brew of Sharpness
artefacts.description: The unit has a +1 to hit modifier with Combat attacks.

artefacts.name: Darklord's Onyx Ring
artefacts.description: Once per game, the hero gains Regeneration (4+); this must be used the first time the unit has any damage on it at the beginning of the hero's Turn.

artefacts.name: Ej Periscope
artefacts.description: The hero gains the Leaper special rule.

artefacts.name: Amulet of the Fireheart
artefacts.description: Once per game, immediately after casting a spell, the hero may cast a second, different spell (no more than two spells in a single Turn).

artefacts.name: Axe of the Giant Slayer
artefacts.description: The hero gains the Slayer (D3) special rule in Combat.

artefacts.name: Crown of the Wizard King
artefacts.description: The hero gains an additional 6" range on all of its spells that target friendly units.

artefacts.name: Mournful Blade
artefacts.description: The hero gains the Duellist (D3) special rule.

artefacts.name: Scythe of the Harvester
artefacts.description: The hero gains the Rampage (D3) special rule in Combat.

artefacts.name: Torc of Command
artefacts.description: Command Orders attempted by this unit can be issued to units within 18" instead of the normal 12".

artefacts.name: Trickster's Wand
artefacts.description: The hero gains the Hex (2) spell.

artefacts.name: Banner of Command
artefacts.description: When rolling to issue a Command Order with this unit, add an additional die to the attempt.

artefacts.name: Blade of the Beast Slayer
artefacts.description: The unit gains Crushing Strength (+1) against Large Infantry, Large Cavalry, and Monsters.

artefacts.name: Boots of the Seven Leagues
artefacts.description: The hero gains the Scout special rule.

artefacts.name: Tome of Darkness
artefacts.description: The hero gains the Surge (5) spell; if it already has Surge, its value is increased by 3 instead.

artefacts.name: Zephyr Crown
artefacts.description: The unit gains the Wind Blast (5) spell; if it already has Wind Blast, its value is increased by 3 instead.

artefacts.name: Shroud of the Saint
artefacts.description: The hero gains the Heal (3) spell; if it already has Heal, its value is increased by 2 instead.

artefacts.name: Wings of Honeymaze
artefacts.description: The hero gains the Fly special rule but decreases its Defence stat by 1, to a minimum of 2+.

artefacts.name: The Boomstick
artefacts.description: The hero gains the Lightning Bolt (3) spell; if it already has Lightning Bolt, its value is increased by 2 instead.

artefacts.name: Inspiring Talisman
artefacts.description: The hero gains the Inspiring special rule.
